input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_specific.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Testing specific token logo sources..."
echo ""

# Test USDC on Base (known token)
USDC_BASE="0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913"

echo "USDC on Base ($USDC_BASE):"
echo "  Symbol-based (usdc): $(curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/usdc.png" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')"
echo "  TrustWallet Base: $(curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/assets/$USDC_BASE/logo.png" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')"

echo ""
echo "Testing Ethereum token icons S3:"
echo "  $(curl -sI "https://ethereum-token-icons.s3.amazonaws.com/$USDC_BASE.png" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')"

EOF

chmod +x /tmp/test_specific.sh
/tmp/test_specific.sh
